product_overview: FMD_FRAMEWORK is a metadata-driven enterprise data pipeline framework for Microsoft Fabric implementing a medallion architecture (Landing Zone → Bronze → Silver → Gold) with an engine for orchestration, adaptive throttling and a React dashboard for real-time monitoring and control.
core_goals: Ensure all Landing Zone, Bronze and Silver entities for four sources are active and fully processed end-to-end (1255 entities total).
Provide reliable pipeline orchestration and monitoring (trigger, poll, retry, abort) with audit logging and SSE log streaming.
Detect and automatically remediate common data pipeline failures (stuck entities, type-mismatches) and surface accurate counts in the dashboard.
Offer repeatable verification and final reporting for compliance and operational transparency.

features.name: Landing Zone Pipeline Monitoring & Trigger
features.description: Check status of LZ pipelines, verify SQL entity counts, trigger or re-run pipelines, and validate OneLake landing files for a workspace.
user_flows: GET /api/engine/runs?pipelineId=bcb5d0c6-a77c-41a3-8644-457b60e51cd2 -> Receive 200 with status=Completed and run metadata -> GET /api/sql/query?sql=SELECT COUNT(*) FROM execution.PipelineLandingzoneEntity PLE INNER JOIN integration.LandingzoneEntity LE ON PLE.LandingzoneEntityId = LE.LandingzoneEntityId WHERE LE.DataSourceId = 6 -> Receive 200 with count=596 -> GET /api/pipelines?workspaceId=146fe38c -> Receive 200 listing pipeline and lakehouse IDs (verify LZ lakehouse 2aef4ede) -> GET /api/engine/logs?runId={runId} -> Receive 200 with final log entries and success markers (HAPPY PATH)

GET /api/engine/runs?pipelineId=bcb5d0c6-a77c-41a3-8644-457b60e51cd2 -> Receive 200 with status=InProgress and SQL count<596 -> POST /api/engine/start with body {"pipelineId":"3d0b3b2b","workspaceId":"146fe38c"} -> Receive 202 with jobUrl -> GET /api/engine/runs?jobUrl={jobUrl} -> Receive 200 with status=Failed -> POST /api/engine/retry with body {"jobUrl":"{jobUrl}"} -> Receive 409 or 500 error (engine rejected retry) -> POST /api/engine/abort-run with body {"jobUrl":"{jobUrl}"} -> Receive 200 acknowledging abort (ERROR FLOW)

features.name: Reactivate Landing Zone Entities
features.description: Re-enable any deactivated LandingZone entities across all data sources and verify activation counts per source.
user_flows: GET /api/sql/query?sql=UPDATE integration.LandingzoneEntity SET IsActive = 1 WHERE IsActive = 0; SELECT DataSourceId, COUNT(*), SUM(CASE WHEN IsActive=1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as Active FROM integration.LandingzoneEntity GROUP BY DataSourceId; -> Receive 200 with rowsAffected and grouped counts showing DS4=445, DS5=29, DS6=596, DS7=185 (HAPPY PATH)

GET /api/sql/query?sql=UPDATE integration.LandingzoneEntity SET IsActive = 1 WHERE IsActive = 0; -> Receive 500 with SQL error -> GET /api/engine/logs -> Receive 200 with engine error details -> POST /api/config with body {"alert":"LZ-activation-failed","details":"SQL error"} -> Receive 200 (ERROR FLOW / escalation)

features.name: Fix MES Incremental Load Type Mismatch
features.description: Detect MES LandingZone entities where an INT watermark column has a datetime LoadValue and reset those last-load values to the safe default '0'.
user_flows: GET /api/sql/query?sql=SELECT LE.LandingzoneEntityId, LE.Name, LLV.LoadValue, LE.IncrementalLoadColumn FROM integration.LandingzoneEntity LE JOIN integration.LastLoadValue LLV ON LE.LandingzoneEntityId = LLV.LandingzoneEntityId WHERE LE.DataSourceId = 4 AND LE.IncrementalLoadType = 'Incremental' AND LLV.LoadValue LIKE '202%-%-%' -> Receive 200 with rows listing broken LoadValue entries -> GET /api/sql/query?sql=UPDATE LLV SET LoadValue = '0' FROM integration.LastLoadValue LLV JOIN integration.LandingzoneEntity LE ON LLV.LandingzoneEntityId = LE.LandingzoneEntityId WHERE LE.DataSourceId = 4 AND LLV.LoadValue LIKE '202%-%-%' -> Receive 200 with rowsAffected>0 -> GET /api/sql/query?sql=SELECT ... (diagnostic query) -> Receive 200 with zero rows returned (HAPPY PATH)

GET /api/sql/query?sql=SELECT ... WHERE LLV.LoadValue LIKE '202%-%-%' -> Receive 200 with rows -> GET /api/sql/query?sql=UPDATE ... SET LoadValue='0' -> Receive 200 but rowsAffected=0 (no change) -> GET /api/engine/logs -> Receive 200 showing permission/lock error -> POST /api/config with body {"ticket":"INC-LOAD-MES","notes":"DB permission or lock preventing update"} -> Receive 200 (ERROR FLOW)

features.name: Run Bronze Pipeline for All Sources
features.description: Trigger the Bronze pipeline across the workspace, poll for completion, and verify Bronze-layer counts and OneLake Bronze tables for M3 ERP and other sources.
user_flows: POST /api/engine/start with body {"pipelineId":"8b7008ac-b4da-4861-9e1f-6b99d9f2f1e3","workspaceId":"146fe38c"} -> Receive 202 with jobUrl -> GET /api/engine/runs?jobUrl={jobUrl} -> Receive 200 with status=InProgress; poll periodically -> GET /api/engine/runs?jobUrl={jobUrl} -> Receive 200 with status=Completed -> GET /api/sql/query?sql=SELECT ds.Name, COUNT(*) as Total, SUM(CASE WHEN PBLE.IsProcessed=1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as Processed FROM execution.PipelineBronzeLayerEntity PBLE JOIN integration.BronzeLayerEntity BLE ON PBLE.BronzeLayerEntityId = BLE.BronzeLayerEntityId JOIN integration.LandingzoneEntity LE ON BLE.LandingzoneEntityId = LE.LandingzoneEntityId JOIN integration.DataSource ds ON LE.DataSourceId = ds.DataSourceId GROUP BY ds.Name -> Receive 200 with processed counts -> GET /api/pipelines?workspaceId=146fe38c -> Receive 200 (includes Bronze lakehouse cf57e8bf; verify M3 ERP has 590+ Bronze tables) (HAPPY PATH)

POST /api/engine/start with body {... pipelineId 8b7008ac ...} -> Receive 202 with jobUrl -> GET /api/engine/runs?jobUrl={jobUrl} -> Receive 200 with status=Failed -> GET /api/engine/logs?runId={runId} -> Receive 200 with error 'stuck entities' -> POST /api/engine/retry with body {"jobUrl":"{jobUrl}"} -> Receive 202 (retry queued) -> GET /api/engine/runs?jobUrl={retryJobUrl} -> Receive 200 with status=Failed and persistent stuck entity ids -> POST /api/engine/entity/310/reset -> Receive 200 acknowledging reset (ERROR FLOW leading into remediation)

features.name: Run Silver Pipeline for All Sources
features.description: Trigger the Silver pipeline, poll for completion, and verify Silver-layer counts and OneLake Silver tables for M3 ERP and other sources.
user_flows: POST /api/engine/start with body {"pipelineId":"90c0535c-c5dc-43a3-b51e-c44ef1808a60","workspaceId":"146fe38c"} -> Receive 202 with jobUrl -> GET /api/engine/runs?jobUrl={jobUrl} -> Receive 200 with status=Completed -> GET /api/sql/query?sql=SELECT ds.Name, COUNT(*) as Total, SUM(CASE WHEN PSLE.IsProcessed=1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as Processed FROM execution.PipelineSilverLayerEntity PSLE JOIN integration.SilverLayerEntity SLE ON PSLE.SilverLayerEntityId = SLE.SilverLayerEntityId JOIN integration.LandingzoneEntity LE ON SLE.LandingzoneEntityId = LE.LandingzoneEntityId JOIN integration.DataSource ds ON LE.DataSourceId = ds.DataSourceId GROUP BY ds.Name -> Receive 200 with processed counts -> GET /api/pipelines?workspaceId=146fe38c -> Receive 200 (includes Silver lakehouse 44a0993f; verify M3 ERP has 590+ Silver tables) (HAPPY PATH)

POST /api/engine/start ... (silver pipeline) -> Receive 202 with jobUrl -> GET /api/engine/runs?jobUrl={jobUrl} -> Receive 200 with status=InProgress -> GET /api/engine/runs?jobUrl={jobUrl} -> Receive 200 with status=Failed and error 'view vw_LoadToSilverLayer returned 0 rows' -> POST /api/config with body {"dashboardFix":"silver_view_filter"} -> Receive 200 acknowledging change or receive 500 if code deployment required -> GET /api/entity/digest -> Receive 200 with still-zero silver counts (ERROR FLOW)

features.name: Fix Stuck MES Bronze/Silver Entities (IDs 310, 426, 1048)
features.description: Reset IsProcessed for the three stuck Bronze entities, confirm they re-enter processing, and re-run Bronze and Silver pipelines until they complete.
user_flows: GET /api/sql/query?sql=UPDATE execution.PipelineBronzeLayerEntity SET IsProcessed = 0, LoadEndDateTime = NULL WHERE BronzeLayerEntityId IN (310,426,1048); -> Receive 200 with rowsAffected=3 -> POST /api/engine/entity/310/reset -> Receive 200 acknowledging entity reset -> POST /api/engine/start with body {"pipelineId":"8b7008ac","workspaceId":"146fe38c"} -> Receive 202 with jobUrl -> GET /api/engine/runs?jobUrl={jobUrl} -> Receive 200 with status=Completed -> POST /api/engine/start with body {"pipelineId":"90c0535c","workspaceId":"146fe38c"} -> Receive 202 with jobUrl -> GET /api/engine/runs?jobUrl={jobUrl} -> Receive 200 with status=Completed -> GET /api/sql/query?sql=SELECT BronzeLayerEntityId, IsProcessed FROM execution.PipelineBronzeLayerEntity WHERE BronzeLayerEntityId IN (310,426,1048) -> Receive 200 showing IsProcessed=1 and similar check for Silver execution table (HAPPY PATH)

GET /api/sql/query?sql=UPDATE execution.PipelineBronzeLayerEntity SET IsProcessed = 0, LoadEndDateTime = NULL WHERE BronzeLayerEntityId IN (310,426,1048); -> Receive 200 with rowsAffected=0 (update failed) -> POST /api/engine/entity/310/reset -> Receive 500 with 'entity not found' -> GET /api/engine/logs -> Receive 200 showing database FK constraint preventing reset -> POST /api/config with body {"ticket":"STUCK-ENTITIES","notes":"DB constraint blocking entity reset"} -> Receive 200 (ERROR FLOW)

features.name: Fix Silver Dashboard Display Bug
features.description: Resolve the dashboard view returning zero rows for Silver by updating the dashboard query/filter or exposing Silver execution counts via entity digest; validate dashboard shows accurate Silver counts.
user_flows: GET /api/entity/digest?layer=silver -> Receive 200 with counts=0 -> POST /api/config with body {"dashboard.override.vw_LoadToSilverLayer.filter":"remove-IsProcessed-filter"} -> Receive 200 acknowledging config change -> GET /api/entity/digest?layer=silver -> Receive 200 with counts>0 reflecting Silver processed entities (HAPPY PATH chosen approach: dashboard config change)

GET /api/entity/digest?layer=silver -> Receive 200 with counts=0 -> POST /api/config with body {"dashboard.override.vw_LoadToSilverLayer.filter":"remove-IsProcessed-filter"} -> Receive 500 due to validation error -> GET /api/purview/search?query=SilverTables OR GET /api/workspaces -> Receive 200 with alternate lineage/table information -> POST /api/config with body {"ticket":"DASHBOARD-SILVER-BUG","notes":"manual dashboard code change required"} -> Receive 200 (ERROR FLOW with mitigation)

features.name: Final Verification & Reporting
features.description: Run a comprehensive verification across all lakes and SQL metadata to confirm every source has expected counts in LZ/Bronze/Silver, ensure IsActive=1, detect orphaned/stuck entities and produce a final summary saved to backend configuration/report store.
user_flows: GET /api/sql/query?sql=SELECT DataSourceId, 'LZ' as Layer, COUNT(*) FROM integration.LandingzoneEntity GROUP BY DataSourceId UNION ALL SELECT DataSourceId, 'Bronze' as Layer, COUNT(*) FROM integration.BronzeLayerEntity GROUP BY DataSourceId UNION ALL SELECT DataSourceId, 'Silver' as Layer, COUNT(*) FROM integration.SilverLayerEntity GROUP BY DataSourceId; -> Receive 200 with per-source per-layer counts -> GET /api/entity/digest -> Receive 200 with aggregated digest and row counts -> GET /api/engine/metrics -> Receive 200 with engine-run metrics and stuck-entity summary -> POST /api/config with body {"finalVerificationReport":{...}} -> Receive 200 with storedReportId (HAPPY PATH)

GET /api/sql/query?sql=...comprehensive counts query... -> Receive 200 but results show discrepancies -> GET /api/engine/logs -> Receive 200 with repeated failures noted -> POST /api/config with body {"finalVerificationReport":"FAILED - see ticket"} -> Receive 200 with ticketId and recommended next actions (ERROR FLOW)

features.name: Engine Control & Real-time Logs (SSE)
features.description: Start/stop the engine, stream run logs in real-time, abort runs, and fetch historical run logs for troubleshooting and audit.
user_flows: POST /api/engine/start with body {"mode":"orchestrator"} -> Receive 202 with engineRunId -> GET /api/engine/logs/stream?runId={engineRunId} -> Receive SSE stream with log lines until producer closes -> POST /api/engine/stop -> Receive 200 acknowledging stop (HAPPY PATH)

POST /api/engine/start -> Receive 500 with 'engine already running' -> GET /api/engine/status -> Receive 200 with status=Running -> POST /api/engine/abort-run with body {"runId":"{engineRunId}"} -> Receive 200 acknowledging abort -> GET /api/engine/logs?runId={engineRunId} -> Receive 200 with partial logs and abort reason (ERROR FLOW)

code_summary.description: Fabric Metadata-Driven Framework (FMD) - Enterprise data pipeline framework for Microsoft Fabric with medallion architecture (Landing Zone → Bronze → Silver → Gold), metadata-driven orchestration, and a modern React dashboard for real-time monitoring and control.

key_features: On-prem to cloud data migration (4 SQL sources)
